creator: areilly@bigpond.net.au
text:
Further news: it turns out that mDNSResponderPosix has no
dependencies other than libc, so the executable that I saved
before deinstalling the port seems to do the trick, even when
the rest of the mDNSResponder port isn't there.  Perhaps it
could be made into a portlett of its own?

Cheers,

Andrew
